item.title: Imgur, beware. That 'day' is unavoidably drawing nearer. Prepare to bask and bathe in mayhem. (Repost for the mouthbreathers bitching about 7-29 not being mentioned or explained in the title despite having a tag and the vid screaming 729)
item.description: Brace yourself, 'gentle'men and m'ladies. "Once a year on July 29th, Imgurians commit themselves to a simple pledge – Upvote Everything. As midnight arrived across the globe, Imgur descends into something akin to a Twilight......"

item.title: Wholesome Saturday dump to warm the heart
item.description:
1. They are so happy :) I wish everyone this kind of happiness in life
2. Let’s take a moment to appreciate the skillfulness of cameramen
3
4. Miniature stone carving
5. The tiniest of woos
6. Greyhound stars a zoomies session at the park
7
8. True happiness
9. Bunny likes to be included
10
11
12. Duckalicious (sound on)
13. Dogs with jobs
14
15. @OP here! I learned a magic trick for you guys! I know it can be improved, but this is my first time ever doing a trick and I am a bit embarrassed to show it (DM me if you want to know how its done). : ) Thank you for making it to the end of the dump. I hope you don't mind me sharing that for the past year and a half, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion, with my brother by my side, helping every step of the way. As indie developers, your support means the world to us. By adding our game to your wishlist, you’ll help us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. Here it is: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ We can’t do this without you. Thank you for supporting our dream and joining us on this wild adventure!

item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Biro.
item.description: In 1930, a Hungarian inventor observed children playing with marbles in a puddle, noticing that the marbles left a trail of water in their wake. That's how the idea came about: why not use a ball-shaped metal nib for writing? This is how the pen was born. László József Biro shared his idea with his brother György, a chemist, and together they began researching and experimenting to create a new type of pen based on this concept. Finally, they found the perfect combination: a viscous ink and a tip with a small ball that rotated freely, preventing the ink from drying out and controlling its flow. They presented their invention at the Budapest International Fair in 1931 and patented it in 1938, although they did not market it immediately. With the start of World War II, the brothers emigrated to Argentina, where they founded a company in a garage. Although they were initially unsuccessful due to the high cost of the product, they secured a contract with the British Air Force, which boosted their popularity. In 1943, they licensed their invention to Eversharp Faber in the United States for $2 million. In 1950, Marcel Bich acquired the rights and, on the recommendation of an advertising expert, dropped the "h" from his surname and founded the company BICGroup. In that year, they launched the first BIC Cristal, one of the most perfect designs ever created, of which more than 20 million units are sold every day around the world. Since 1953, more than 100 billion BIC Cristals have been manufactured, making it the best-selling pen of all time.
item.dc:creator: iceage2012

item.title: It’s been a week
item.description: My mom died last week. We hadn’t spoken since before the pandemic. People who don’t know the details want to talk to me about it and say how sorry they are, how sad I must be. Yeah, a little. But more because of the missed potential - I deserved better. All my siblings did. If you have a good mom, though? You give her a hug for me. My wife is a great mom, and I adore her for it more than she’ll ever know.
item.dc:creator: jzbstl

item.title: Cake Day Post
item.description:
Its been a few years. I mostly scroll and upvote. Thank you all for being amazing, caring, kind, and supportive to one another. Rarely do I post, but here is one: Modified cartoon that I made to reflect those who want to be outside
During my time here I wrote my second book! It explains some key concepts in ecology and how to support wildlife with many missing resources including soils, shelters, native plants, water, and wood. Full post on book here https://imgur.com/gallery/finally-wrote-book-IOB3hBl
Finished a large native bee study that we are in the process of publishing now. These are mostly bees from west Texas which has previously not had any studies conducted. However, the lands have been under intense development for oil extraction.
In my time on Imgur I also got to revisit some old work sites where we restored vegetation communities to support the Mt. Charleston Blue Butterfly. During my visit I was able to find one of the adults!
item.dc:creator: Mccoshsm

item.title: The tallest sea stack in the world
item.description: Ball's Pyramid, 1852 ft tall. Located an hour's boat ride from the remote Lord Howe Island in Australia
item.dc:creator: iwasdoingfinelurking

item.title: 18 months
item.description: -70 lbs (230-160) 514 days smoke free. 229 days alcohol free. This update pic is also from April since then I’ve been maingaining successfully. In steady at about 9-11% body fat and eating in a +15% calorie surplus with a 3-5x a week workout program. MV Edit: thanks for all amazing words of encouragement and support you all make this the best place on the internet! Hey please give my little brother some love on twitch. https://www.twitch.tv/thevikingwargod he’s super good at video games and he’s an awesome little brother. I should have mentioned that I am not new to the gym. While my results seem very dramatic I had years of knowledge and weight training under my belt already before I stated this transformation. While I’ve never made it this far into my fitness journey before the foundations I had built before this were critically essential to my success. However With time and patience and a lot of study almost anybody can achieve these same results. Thank you @firefollower for pointing this out I don’t want to give anyone false expectations or to feel bad about their own progress in contrast.
item.dc:creator: BurningVeryImportantThings

item.title: A Chinese click farm in action.
item.description: a Chinese click farm where vote manipulation happens across the internet. Giving up quotes and down votes to certain posts by the hundreds to manipulate the narrative.
item.dc:creator: ProfessorGigglesworth
